rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST FAILURE

The command bar feature could not be exercised — the UI does not expose an interactive command input to trigger the AI parser.

Observations:
- After signing in, the page displays the text 'Command Bar Placeholder (Phase 3)' but no interactive command input is present.
- Searching the page returned zero input, textarea, combobox, or contenteditable elements, and pressing '/' did not reveal an input.
- Because the command-input cannot be opened or found, the AI parsing flow and Event Dialog could not be triggered for verification.
